To the Winter 2025 Exec Team ❄️💼

Thank you for an amazing term — it’s been such a joy working alongside each of you 💖 You all made W25 unforgettable. I know the next S25 Team will be just as incredible (maybe even better 👀).

Want to be an Exec one day?
We highly recommend joining our Spring 2025 Volunteer Team 🌱✨ It’s the best way to get involved before applying for Exec in future terms (including Fall 2025)!
📅 Volunteer Apps drop May 1st — don’t miss it!

With love always,
VPC
